# Roji Research Tools — Full Reference

> Comprehensive documentation of all Roji Peptide Research Tools, including input/output schemas, compound database coverage, and supplement interaction database.

## Site

- URL: https://tools.rojipeptides.com
- MCP Server: https://mcp.rojipeptides.com/mcp
- Shop: https://rojipeptides.com/shop
- All tools are free, no login, no API key required.

---

## Tool 1: Reconstitution Calculator

URL: https://tools.rojipeptides.com/reconstitution
MCP tool name: `reconstitution_calculator`

Calculate peptide reconstitution math for research use.

### Inputs
- `vialMg` (number, required): Peptide content in the vial, in milligrams
- `waterMl` (number, required): Volume of bacteriostatic water to add, in mL
- `doseMcg` (number, required): Target dose in micrograms
- `syringe` (string, optional): Syringe type — "u100" (default, 1 mL), "u50" (0.5 mL), "u40" (0.4 mL)

### Outputs
- `concentrationMcgPerMl`: Concentration in mcg/mL
- `concentrationMcgPerUnit`: Concentration in mcg per syringe unit
- `unitsPerDose`: How many syringe units per dose
- `mlPerDose`: Volume per dose in mL
- `totalDoses`: Total doses obtainable from the vial
- `alternativeDoses`: Suggested round-number dose alternatives with unit counts
- `warnings`: Array of warning strings (e.g., dose exceeds syringe capacity)

---

## Tool 2: Half-Life Database

URL: https://tools.rojipeptides.com/half-life
MCP tool name: `half_life_lookup`

Look up pharmacokinetic data for 20+ research peptides.

### Inputs
- `compound` (string, required): Compound name or slug. Pass "list" to get all available compounds.

### Outputs
- `slug`, `name`, `aliases`, `category`, `oneLiner`
- `molecularWeightDa`: Molecular weight in Daltons
- `halfLifeHoursByRoute`: Half-life ranges in hours by administration route (subq, iv, oral, intranasal)
- `bioavailabilityNotes`: Per-route bioavailability information
- `storageNotes`, `solubilityNotes`: Handling information
- `references`: Array of { label, url } literature citations
- `decayCurve`: Exponential decay model data points for visualization

### Compound Database Coverage
Categories: GH-axis, Healing, Cognitive, Metabolic, Immune, Structural, Sexual

Compounds: BPC-157, TB-500, CJC-1295 (no DAC), CJC-1295 with DAC, Ipamorelin, Tesamorelin, Sermorelin, GHRP-2, GHRP-6, MK-677, MOTS-c, Epithalon, Selank, Semax, Thymalin, Thymosin Alpha-1, GHK-Cu, PT-141, Melanotan II, AOD-9604

---

## Tool 3: COA Analyzer

URL: https://tools.rojipeptides.com/coa
MCP tool name: `coa_analyzer`

Analyze Certificate of Analysis documents for peptide quality assessment.

### Inputs
- `text` (string, required): Full text content of the COA document

### Outputs
- `trustScore`: 0–100 trust score
- `fields`: Array of identified fields (HPLC purity, mass spec, water content, peptide content, sequence, lab, lot, date) with values, good/bad status, and plain-English explanations
- `flags`: Negative signals (missing data, low purity, etc.)
- `positives`: Positive signals
- `identifiedLab`: Recognized lab name (Janoshik, Anresco, Pyrum, CDN Bio, Eurofins, etc.) or null
- `identifiedCompound`: Recognized compound name or null
- `identifiedDate`: COA date or null

### Scoring Methodology
- HPLC purity ≥98%: +25 points (present but <98%: +10)
- Mass spectrometry confirmation: +20
- Peptide content ≥80%: +15
- Named third-party lab: +15
- Water content ≤10%: +10
- Sequence printed: +5
- Batch/lot number: +5
- Date within 18 months: +5

---

## Tool 4: Cost-Per-Dose Calculator

URL: https://tools.rojipeptides.com/cost-per-dose
MCP tool name: `cost_per_dose`

Compare peptide vendors by cost per dose.

### Inputs
- `targetDoseMcg` (number, required): Target dose in micrograms
- `vendors` (array, required): Array of vendor objects:
  - `name` (string): Vendor name
  - `vialMg` (number): Peptide content per vial in mg
  - `purityPct` (number): Purity percentage (e.g., 99)
  - `priceUsd` (number): Price per vial in USD
  - `shippingUsd` (number, optional): Shipping cost in USD

### Outputs
Per vendor: `totalCost`, `effectiveMg`, `dosesPerVial`, `costPerMg`, `costPerDose`
- `bestValue`: Name of the vendor with the lowest cost per dose

---

## Tool 5: Body Recomp Calculator

URL: https://tools.rojipeptides.com/recomp
MCP tool name: `recomp_calculator`

Calculate body recomposition targets using Mifflin-St Jeor BMR.

### Inputs
- `sex` ("male" | "female"): Biological sex
- `age` (number): Age in years
- `heightIn` (number): Height in inches
- `weightLb` (number): Weight in pounds
- `bodyFatPct` (number): Estimated body fat percentage
- `activity` ("sedentary" | "light" | "moderate" | "active" | "very_active")
- `focus` ("lean" | "fat" | "both"): Goal — build muscle (+250 kcal), lose fat (-500 kcal), or recomp (-100 kcal)
- `trainingFreq` (number): Training sessions per week (0–7)
- `proteinPerLbLbm` (number, optional, default 1.0): Protein grams per pound of lean body mass

### Outputs
- BMR, TDEE, target kcal
- Macro split: protein, fat, carbs in grams
- 8/12/16-week projection: weight, lean body mass, fat mass, body fat %
- Warnings (e.g., macros exceed target, high BF%, low training frequency)

---

## Tool 6: Supplement Interaction Checker

URL: https://tools.rojipeptides.com/interactions
MCP tool name: `supplement_interactions`

Check interactions between OTC supplements.

### Inputs
- `supplements` (array of strings, required): Array of supplement slugs. Pass ["list"] to see all available.

### Outputs
- Interactions grouped by severity: synergy, timing, redundant, caution
- Each interaction includes: pair, severity, suggested action, plain-English explanation

### Supplement Database
50+ supplements across categories: Vitamins (A, D3, E, K2, C, B-complex, B1–B12), Minerals (calcium, magnesium, zinc, copper, iron, iodine, selenium, boron, chromium), Amino acids (creatine, L-arginine, L-citrulline, L-carnitine, taurine, glycine, L-theanine, tyrosine, 5-HTP, glutamine, NAC), Fatty acids (omega-3, krill oil), Botanicals (ashwagandha, rhodiola, tongkat ali, maca, curcumin, berberine, ginseng, ginkgo, green tea extract, garlic, yohimbine), Other (melatonin, probiotics, CoQ10, alpha-lipoic acid, caffeine, magnesium threonate)

---

## Tool 7: PubMed Research Search

URL: https://tools.rojipeptides.com/research
MCP tool name: `pubmed_search`

Search PubMed with automatic study-type classification.

### Inputs
- `query` (string, required): PubMed search query
- `limit` (number, optional, default 10, max 20): Maximum results
- `sort` ("relevance" | "date", optional, default "relevance")

### Outputs
Per result: `pmid`, `title`, `authors`, `journal`, `pubYear`, `doi`, `pubTypes`, `url`, `studyType`

Study types classified: Meta-analysis, Systematic Review, RCT, Clinical Trial, Cohort, Review, Animal, In vitro, Other

---

## Additional Tools (Web-only, not yet in MCP)

### Bloodwork Interpreter
URL: https://tools.rojipeptides.com/bloodwork
Interpret blood panel results with reference ranges and plain-English explanations.

### AI Research Assistant
URL: https://tools.rojipeptides.com/ai
AI-powered peptide research Q&A with citations.

---

## About Roji Peptides

Roji Peptides provides research-grade peptide stacks for laboratory use. All products are third-party tested and COA-verified. US-based.

- Shop: https://rojipeptides.com/shop
- Research Library: https://rojipeptides.com/research-library/
- COA Library: https://rojipeptides.com/coa/
- FAQ: https://rojipeptides.com/faq/

For research and laboratory use only.
